title: Christmas Mum Gifts for Women, Winzwon Solar Butterfly Wind Chimes Garden Birthday Gifts for Her Grandma Nanny, Solar Lights Outdoor Decor for Garden Yard Porch Mothers Day
features: Christmas Gifts for Women: This wind chime is of suitable size and beautifully packaged. Each wind chime has a different length, so that they are not easy to knot together. Giving it as Thanksgiving gifts, Christmas gifts for your family and friends. Especially Ideal for wife, daughter, mum, grandma

Birthday Gifts for Women: The outdoor wind chimes have 6 LED solar lights. The tones of the solar wind chimes for garden are gentle and melodic, creating new songs each time the wind blows. The person who receives the gift on birthday will feel very happy

Mothers Day Gift for Mother and Grandmother: The solar wind chimes are waterproof for outdoors and have two stytle hook for hanging.You can easily hang this wind chimes on trees, fences, lawn, doors, window and any other places you like. It's very suitable for giving to your mother and grandma on Mother's Day

Beautiful Garden Gifts: The wind chimes are solar powered. After a day of direct sun the wind chimes will automatically glow in the dark at night. All kinds of beautiful colors and they change colors in the process. The size of the resin is quite close to the real ones, which are vivid garden decor for everyone you love

Interesting Garden or Outdoor Decoration: The outdoor wind chimes can illuminate your garden, terrace, bedroom windows, front yard, garden, camping ground. You can also hang the solar wind chime outside the bedroom window as a chandelier and nice decoration. The wind chime flies gently in the breeze
